title: Block Staffs
description: Adds Block staffs from Animation vs Minecraft by Alan Becker to Minecraft!
body:
Have you ever seen Alan Beckers Latest Animation vs Minecraft episodes and wondered if it was possible to make it in-game? No? Well I don't care! Anyway now my questions are answerd as I have added a _Single_ block staff! And it only took two months!
(more to come tho, and alot faster too.)

BEHOLD:

![A player (me) holding a coal block staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9b57e82eca33c56ebe3842224d46b58be7cda84_0.webp)

TWO MONTHS OF EFFORT!

Well it doesn't really show everything it does, but you're looking at what around 3 weeks got me.
And now for the next 1.6 months:
The coal block staff has 4.5 attack damage, but if you sprint or critical hit, you do 9 damage! _(for the same attack speed as a sword, you get an axe's damage)_
Oh and also sprint hitting or critting breaks blocks too!


The iron, gold, diamond and netherite block staff will do the same thing but bigger and better _(The gold and possibly netherite might have the same properties as the mace)_. The rest will do completely unique things _(for the most part)_, so stay updated to see what comes next!
Currently you can only get it through commands, but in the next update or two, I'll make it craftable.

This project isn't actually a mod, it's a datapack! If you don't know how to install a datapack, here's a video on how to install it:<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XcmioiOm9EQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

And heres my video showcasing everything it does! <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ihUfUrINFGk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_(This is my second ever video other than animations so know that I'm still learning lol)_
